facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 218 reviews. At a rooftop bar on Bãi Trường.

Fu Bar at Regent Phu Quoc is not a secret. It's just that good. Sunset drinks with that view hit different when the rating actually holds up in person.

Phu Quoc has plenty of beach bars. Few score this consistently. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun drop behind Bãi Trường from Fu Bar at Regent Phu Quoc. 4.9 stars. 218 people were right. This is the one you book ahead for.
